property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\Windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\Maven\apache-maven-3.9.16\bin;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin\;C:\Users\user\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\user\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\user\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\user\AppData\Local\Programs\cursor\resources\app\bin;C:\Users\user\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity IDE\bin;.

testcase.name: transferByAccountNumber_Success
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T11:56:19.925+05:30 INFO 15000 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AccountService : [AccountService] Initialized with AccountRepository 2026-06-23T11:56:20.001+05:30 INFO 15000 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AccountService : [AccountService] transferByAccountNumber: from='123456789012', to='234567890123', amount=200.00 2026-06-23T11:56:20.004+05:30 INFO 15000 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AccountService : [AccountService] transferByAccountNumber: Transfer SUCCESS. from='123456789012' (balance=800.00), to='234567890123' (balance=700.00)

testcase.name: getAccountByAccountNumber_Success

testcase.name: getAccountByAccountNumber_Empty_ThrowsException

testcase.name: createAccount_Success
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T11:56:20.139+05:30 INFO 15000 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AccountService : [AccountService] Initialized with AccountRepository 2026-06-23T11:56:20.186+05:30 INFO 15000 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AccountService : [AccountService] createAccount: holderName='John Doe', initialBalance=1000.00 2026-06-23T11:56:20.221+05:30 DEBUG 15000 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AccountService : [AccountService] generateUniqueAccountNumber: Attempt 1 - trying '444616330770' 2026-06-23T11:56:20.221+05:30 INFO 15000 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AccountService : [AccountService] createAccount: Generated unique account number '444616330770' 2026-06-23T11:56:20.221+05:30 INFO 15000 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AccountService : [AccountService] createAccount: Account CREATED. id=1, accountNumber='123456789012', holderName='John Doe', balance=1000.00

testcase.name: credit_Success
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T11:56:20.223+05:30 INFO 15000 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AccountService : [AccountService] Initialized with AccountRepository 2026-06-23T11:56:20.223+05:30 INFO 15000 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AccountService : [AccountService] credit: Crediting amount=500.00 to account id=1 2026-06-23T11:56:20.223+05:30 DEBUG 15000 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AccountService : [AccountService] getAccount: Looking up account by id=1 2026-06-23T11:56:20.223+05:30 INFO 15000 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AccountService : [AccountService] credit: Credit SUCCESS. Account id=1, new balance=1500.00

testcase.name: transfer_SameAccount_ThrowsException
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T11:56:20.224+05:30 INFO 15000 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AccountService : [AccountService] Initialized with AccountRepository 2026-06-23T11:56:20.227+05:30 INFO 15000 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AccountService : [AccountService] transfer: from=1, to=1, amount=10 2026-06-23T11:56:20.227+05:30 WARN 15000 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AccountService : [AccountService] transfer: REJECTED - same account transfer

testcase.name: transfer_InvalidAmount_ThrowsException
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T11:56:20.228+05:30 INFO 15000 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AccountService : [AccountService] Initialized with AccountRepository 2026-06-23T11:56:20.234+05:30 INFO 15000 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AccountService : [AccountService] transfer: from=1, to=2, amount=null 2026-06-23T11:56:20.234+05:30 WARN 15000 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AccountService : [AccountService] transfer: REJECTED - invalid amount=null 2026-06-23T11:56:20.259+05:30 INFO 15000 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AccountService : [AccountService] transfer: from=1, to=2, amount=0 2026-06-23T11:56:20.259+05:30 WARN 15000 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AccountService : [AccountService] transfer: REJECTED - invalid amount=0 2026-06-23T11:56:20.261+05:30 INFO 15000 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AccountService : [AccountService] transfer: from=1, to=2, amount=-10 2026-06-23T11:56:20.261+05:30 WARN 15000 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.AccountService : [AccountService] transfer: REJECTED - invalid amount=-10

testcase.name: createAccount_InitialBalanceNull_ThrowsException
